_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: Cell viabilities were assessed using CellTiter-Glo assays and plotted as % relative to DMSO controls
details: Used to assess cell viabilities in dose-response curves for drug testing in NF2-deficient meningioma cells
